day2_lunch_start.name: 私
day2_lunch_start.text: *昼休み。今日はどこで食べようか。*

day2_lunch_choice.name: 私
choices: ユナに会いに図書室へ行く

day2_lunch_sea_1.name: ハン・セア
day2_lunch_sea_1.text: "I packed lunch again today. I noticed you ate a lot of the rolled egg yesterday, so I added more."

day2_lunch_sea_2.name: ハン・セア
day2_lunch_sea_2.text: "ねえ、{name}……私以外の子たちとよく遊んでる？"

day2_lunch_sea_3.name: 私
day2_lunch_sea_3.text: *セアが僕の手の甲をそっと握る。小さくて温かい手だ。*

day2_lunch_sea_4.name: 私
day2_lunch_sea_4.text: *「……{name}は私のだからね。」セアが囁いた。冗談だと思ったけど……表情が真剣だ。あ、違うか。笑っているから冗談だろう。*

day2_lunch_sea_5.name: 私
day2_lunch_sea_5.text: "...How early did you get up to make all this?"

day2_lunch_sea_6.name: ハン・セア
day2_lunch_sea_6.text: "It makes me happy when you eat it all. Don't leave anything."

day2_lunch_sea_7.name: 私
day2_lunch_sea_7.text: *Sea smiles. But one thing nags at me. It's true I ate a lot of the rolled egg yesterday. But how does she remember that so clearly? Even down to the portions?*

day2_lunch_sea_8.name: 私
day2_lunch_sea_8.text: *...She must just be observant. Class president and all.*

day2_lunch_sea_9.name: 私
day2_lunch_sea_9.text: *We talked about all sorts of things while eating. Music, games, movies...*

day2_lunch_sea_10.name: 私
day2_lunch_sea_10.text: *Sea hands me one earbud. A soft song plays. ...Sharing earbuds brings us naturally closer together. Sea's hair smells like shampoo.*

day2_lunch_sea_13.name: ハン・セア
day2_lunch_sea_13.text: "...{name}, do you hang out with a lot of other people besides me?"

day2_lunch_sea_15.name: 私
day2_lunch_sea_15.text: *Sea gently grabs the back of my hand. Soft, but... fingers that have no intention of letting go.*

day2_lunch_sea_16.name: ハン・セア
day2_lunch_sea_16.text: "...Wherever {name} is, whatever you're doing, I'll always know. That's what friends are for."

day2_lunch_sea_17.name: 私
day2_lunch_sea_17.text: *Sea said it softly. She's smiling. But whether those eyes are smiling too... I can't quite tell. When I tried to gently pull my hand back, Sea held it tighter. ...Then naturally let go after a second, smiling.*

day2_lunch_sea_18.name: ハン・セア
day2_lunch_sea_18.text: "...I'm joking. I just mean I like you, {name}."

day2_lunch_sea_19.name: 私
day2_lunch_sea_19.text: *What was that just now? ...It was just a close friend messing around, probably.*

day2_lunch_yuna_1.name: 私
day2_lunch_yuna_1.text: *I walk into the library to find Yuna tinkering with a camera at a desk.*

day2_lunch_yuna_2.name: 私
day2_lunch_yuna_2.text: *写真をめくっていたら、また変な写真が目に入る。職員室の前に書類の山が積まれた写真。……これをなぜ撮ったんだろう？*

day2_lunch_yuna_3.name: チェ・ユナ
day2_lunch_yuna_3.text: "あ、それは間違いです！ 消しますね！"

day2_lunch_yuna_4.name: 私
day2_lunch_yuna_4.text: "This came out really well. The composition is great."

day2_lunch_yuna_5.name: 私
day2_lunch_yuna_5.text: *The hill, the gym, the field... Nice shots. Lots of frames where the light came in beautifully.*

day2_lunch_yuna_6.name: チェ・ユナ
day2_lunch_yuna_6.text: "Really?! The light was good today. This time of day is the prettiest."

day2_lunch_yuna_7.name: 私
day2_lunch_yuna_7.text: "You got the cat too. A tabby?"

day2_lunch_yuna_8.name: チェ・ユナ
day2_lunch_yuna_8.text: "Yes! I gave him a can of tuna today and he loved it. Look at this expression."

day2_lunch_yuna_9.name: 私
day2_lunch_yuna_9.text: *I keep flipping through the photos... but as I get further, the tone of the pictures changes. A stack of documents in front of the faculty office. The medicine cabinet in the nurse's office. Stairs descending underground.*

day2_lunch_yuna_11.name: チェ・ユナ
day2_lunch_yuna_11.text: "Oh, that was... an accident. I'll delete it."

day2_lunch_yuna_12.name: 私
day2_lunch_yuna_12.text: *Yuna hurriedly closes the camera. The same girl who was happily talking about the cat a moment ago suddenly went rigid.*

day2_lunch_yuna_13.name: チェ・ユナ
day2_lunch_yuna_13.text: "Senpai... you'll come again tomorrow, right? ...Please come."

day2_lunch_riin_1.name: 私
day2_lunch_riin_1.text: *I go to the nurse's office and Nurse Riin greets me as if she'd been expecting me.*

day2_lunch_riin_2.name: 保健教師
day2_lunch_riin_2.text: "血圧、視力、体重……いろいろチェックさせてね。腕、まくってくれる？"

day2_lunch_riin_3.name: 私
day2_lunch_riin_3.text: *健康診断にしては……質問がちょっと変だった。『睡眠パターン』、『薬物アレルギー』、『家族の病歴』まで。養護教諭がここまで聞くものなのか？*

day2_lunch_riin_4.name: 私
day2_lunch_riin_4.text: *She wraps the blood pressure cuff around my arm. Nurse Riin's hands are cold. But unexpectedly gentle.*

day2_lunch_riin_5.name: カン・リイン
day2_lunch_riin_5.text: "Blood pressure normal. Eyesight... both eyes are good. Weight... healthy for your age."

day2_lunch_riin_6.name: カン・リイン
day2_lunch_riin_6.text: "That's good. ...But let me ask a few more things. The transfer student form is a bit detailed."

day2_lunch_riin_7.name: カン・リイン
day2_lunch_riin_7.text: "Sleep patterns? How many hours do you sleep on average? Do you dream often?"

day2_lunch_riin_9.name: カン・リイン
day2_lunch_riin_9.text: "Any drug allergies? On the sedative side?"

day2_lunch_riin_10.name: 私
day2_lunch_riin_10.text: *For a health check, the questions are a bit detailed. Does a school nurse really ask about sleep patterns and sedative allergies?*

day2_lunch_riin_11.name: 私
day2_lunch_riin_11.text: *Nurse Riin is writing something down. It looks like a health record... but the form seems a bit different from the usual kind.*

day2_lunch_riin_13.name: カン・リイン
day2_lunch_riin_13.text: "...Come by often in the future. I'll take good care of you."

day2_lunch_riin_14.name: 私
day2_lunch_riin_14.text: *Nurse Riin smiles and holds the door open for me. She's a kind person.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_1.name: 私
day2_lunch_rooftop_1.text: *I'm climbing the stairs to go up to the rooftop when I hear a voice from the middle landing.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_2.name: 私
day2_lunch_rooftop_2.text: *……ウンス先生の声だ。「……あの子の状態は安定しています。予定通り進めても……」電話しているようだ。何の話だろう？*

day2_lunch_rooftop_3.name: 私
day2_lunch_rooftop_3.text: *気配を出したら先生が慌てて電話を切った。ただの業務連絡だろう。*

day2_lunch_rooftop_4.name: 私
day2_lunch_rooftop_4.text: *What is she talking about? Whose situation? When I made a noise, the teacher quickly hung up. Her expression froze for a moment when she turned around, then immediately relaxed.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_5.name: パク・ウンス
day2_lunch_rooftop_5.text: "{name}? ...Going to the rooftop? You should have just eaten in the classroom."

day2_lunch_rooftop_6.name: 私
day2_lunch_rooftop_6.text: "I wanted to get some fresh air."

day2_lunch_rooftop_7.name: パク・ウンス
day2_lunch_rooftop_7.text: "Sure, getting some air is good. But don't go near the railing. It's dangerous."

day2_lunch_rooftop_8.name: 私
day2_lunch_rooftop_8.text: *The teacher smiled and passed by. It was probably just a work call. ...But what does 'proceed as planned' mean?*

day2_lunch_rooftop_9.name: 私
day2_lunch_rooftop_9.text: *I've reached the rooftop. The wind is blowing. A bit colder than yesterday.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_10.name: 私
day2_lunch_rooftop_10.text: *I don't want to think about it. I'll just enjoy the breeze.*
